bodyHtml:

Why cmux-iphone Is Trending

The Mobile landscape is constantly evolving, and cmux-iphone has emerged as one of the fastest-growing projects this week. Several factors contribute to its momentum:

  1. Growing community: With 0 new stars this week alone, developer adoption is accelerating rapidly.
  2. Active maintenance: The project sees regular updates, ensuring compatibility with the latest ecosystem changes.
  3. Practical utility: Bridge your Claude Code / Codex / cmux sessions to your iPhone & Apple Watch — approve, prompt, and mirror live terminals on the go.

If you're working in Mobile, this is definitely a project worth watching — and adopting.

Quick Start

Get started with cmux-iphone in minutes:

# Clone the repository git clone https://github.com/lim-won/cmux-iphone # Navigate to project cd cmux-iphone # Check the README for detailed setup instructions

For full documentation and advanced usage, visit the official GitHub repository.

Final Thoughts

cmux-iphone is a solid addition to any developer's toolkit. With its growing community, active development, and practical design, it's well worth your time to evaluate. Star it on GitHub, try it in a side project, and see if it fits your workflow.
